package service

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for service_depends_on_transport_request_type: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Service signatures that accept request DTOs declared in handler or transport packages.
type CaseServiceDependsOnTransportRequestTypeDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseServiceDependsOnTransportRequestTypeModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseServiceDependsOnTransportRequestTypeRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseServiceDependsOnTransportRequestTypeModel
}

type CaseServiceDependsOnTransportRequestTypeService struct {
    repo *CaseServiceDependsOnTransportRequestTypeRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseServiceDependsOnTransportRequestTypeAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeServiceDependsOnTransportRequestType(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseServiceDependsOnTransportRequestTypeDTO) error {

    model := CaseServiceDependsOnTransportRequestTypeModel{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    if err := db.WithContext(ctx).Save(&model).Error; err != nil {
        return fmt.Errorf("save failed: %w", err)
    }
    return nil
}
